modules.name: Introduction
modules.description: Course introduction, pre-assessment, and scenario overview.

lessons.title: Course Introduction
topics: Introduction to the data science lifecycle
Course overview and scenario: Stock Market Panda-monium

modules.name: Introduction to Pandas
modules.description: Pandas fundamentals including DataFrames, Series, data exploration, and basic operations.

lessons.title: Intro to Pandas
topics: Exploring rows, columns, data types, non-null observations

lessons.title: Exercise: Intro to Pandas — Movie Plots
topics: Hands-on practice with Wikipedia Movie Plots dataset

lessons.title: Exercise: Intro to Pandas — Zoo
topics: Hands-on practice with UCI ML Zoo Animal Classification dataset

modules.name: ETL and Pandas
modules.description: Extract, Transform, Load workflows using Pandas for data cleaning, transformation, and merging.

lessons.title: Exercise: ETL with Pandas — Goodreads
topics: Hands-on ETL practice with Goodreads dataset

modules.name: Introduction to Data Visualizations with Pandas
modules.description: Creating and customizing data visualizations using Pandas with matplotlib and other libraries.

modules.name: Summarizing with Pandas
modules.description: Data aggregation, grouping, descriptive statistics, and pivot tables with Pandas.

modules.name: Summative Assessment
modules.description: Assessment preparation and summative assessment for Pandas.

assessment.title: Pandas Summative Assessment
items: Summative assessment covering Pandas fundamentals, ETL, visualizations, and summarization
